summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PLB Logistique website - backend APIs 100% functional, frontend 95% functional with minor navigation issue

ui_bugs.issue: Services navigation link returns to home page instead of navigating to /services

integration_issues.issue: Dashboard shows 0 for all stats despite data being created via forms

passed_tests: Delivery request form submission and success flow
Feedback form with star rating submission
Home page loading and hero section
Navigation to Comment ça marche, À propos, Contact pages
Light color theme (sky blue, light grey, white)
All form validations and error handling
Form reset functionality after successful submissions
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Services navigation link to properly route to /services page instead of returning to home. Investigate admin dashboard stats not updating in real-time - may need to refresh data after form submissions.
